title: JRZD-460 First Shooting Wife Document Yumiko Satsuki - Yumiko May
overview: The wife of this time is Yumiko Satsuki, 44 years old, who was asked to appear in the city. At first, I was surprised to hear that she was an adult, but she is a very devoted and kind wife who says, "If there is someone who needs me like this, I'm embarrassed, but I felt like I should go out." Her sexless and lonely body is sensitive, and she was very satisfied with the polite caress, blowing out a surprising amount of tide and climaxing many times.
